scripts.tests: cd tb; SIM=ghdl TEST_NAME=test_all pytest -o log_cli=True test_axis_counter.py
scripts.tests_reset: cd tb; SIM=ghdl TEST_NAME=reset_tb pytest -o  log_cli=True test_axis_counter.py
scripts.tests_counter_up: cd tb; SIM=ghdl TEST_NAME=counter_up_tb pytest -o log_cli=True test_axis_counter.py
scripts.tests_counter_down: cd tb; SIM=ghdl TEST_NAME=counter_down_tb pytest -o log_cli=True test_axis_counter.py
scripts.tests_counter_start_and_stop: cd tb; SIM=ghdl TEST_NAME=counter_start_and_stop_tb pytest -o log_cli=True test_axis_counter.py
